title: juncus ebracteatus
intro: Juncus ebracteatus, also known as the 'Square-stemmed Rush', is a type of flowering plant in the family Juncaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Juncus ebracteatus include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Juncus ebracteatus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal effects.
